nasb.text: Out of all these people 700 choice men were left-handed; each one could sling a stone at a hair and not miss.

esv.text: Among all these were 700 chosen men who were left-handed; every one could sling a stone at a hair and not miss.

cnv.text: 在這些人中，還有七百精兵是善用左手的，個個都能用機弦拋石，毫髮不差。

ccb.text: 军中有七百精兵善用左手甩石，毫发不差。
